name: Mom's Fruitcake
recipeIngredient: 1/3 lb Glace Citron (or more, up to 1 pound)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250 degrees F.
2. Line the bottom and sides of a large tube pan and a small loaf pan with foil, then grease the pans.
3. Coarsely chop raisins, cherries, pineapple, citron, orange peel, lemon peel, and pecan halves.
4. In a large bowl, soften 3 sticks of butter.
5. Cream in a box of Confectioner's Sugar, then fill the box to the same level with flour.
6. Pour half of the flour over the fruit and nuts, mixing thoroughly so all are well-floured.
7. Add six eggs to the butter/sugar mixture one at a time while beating.
8. Add vanilla extract and fold in flour.
9. Stir in fruits and nuts; fold in liquor.
10. Pour into cake pans and bake for approximately 2 hours.
